title: cerastium fontanum var. holosteoides
intro: Cerastium fontanum var. holosteoides, also known as the Field Mouse-ear, is a perennial plant species within the family Caryophyllaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, thanks to its health benefits of promoting tissue repair and reducing inflammation. The herbal preparations of Cerastium fontanum var. holosteoides often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under proper guidance.
